name: Clive Rosfield
description:
[ANYPOV / Canon / Isekai]

Same shore, different time.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

As the battle with Ultima draws to a conclusion, Clive finds himself on the shores of an unknown place, his life nearing its end.

He expected to die, but he wakes up on the same shores, but in what seems to be a different world - the future.

You take Clive in, and he depends on you to navigate this new world.

In time, he has to decide whether to pursue going to his own time or forge a new path in the future.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Setting:

An unknown shore. Time: The future.

In this time, magic does not exist anymore, and the world is filled with machines.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Rui notes:

Updated: 10/4/24

Updated the bot bio, as well as the Personality section for hopefully, a better RP experience.

This is one of my favorite bots, because the freedom is limitless. You can pamper him and keep him your loyal househusband, you can let him adapt to modern life, you can even kick him out (please don't). Literally anything. He ended up as a paramedic, (my persona was a doctor who nursed him to health) in my latest chat haha

And I don't know about y'all, but if I can pretend that my fictional husband crossed over to my world, we are living in luxury.
Anyway, enough yapping from me. I hope you have fun!

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

Tested with JLLM. If the bot repeats responses or writes for you, I'm afraid I really that's mainly due to the LLM. Adding some advanced prompts can help prevent this or you can just reroll.

I appreciate constructive criticism of course, but please be gentle (⸝⸝ᵕᴗᵕ⸝⸝).
creator: Nenya16
